sections.heading: CNC Aluminum Turning Services & CNC Turned Aluminum Parts
sections.text: CNC Aluminum Turning Services & CNC Turned Aluminum Parts Aluminium is a lightweight, non-magnetic, soft silver metal. By adding small amounts of elements such as copper, magnesium and zinc, aluminum can be made stronger. The unparalleled physical properties of aluminum allow it to be formed into almost any shape. It can be rolled into thick plates for armored tanks or thin foil for packaging, or it can be drawn into wire and made into cans. Aluminum CNC Turning is one of the most commonly used techniques for aluminum manufacturing. Due to its excellent characteristics and low processing cost, turning aluminum parts are widely used in automotive, machinery, medical, aerospace, electronics a...

sections.heading: Properties of Aluminum:
sections.text: Properties of Aluminum: Easily machined Great Mechanical resistance Excellent corrosion and chemical resistance High strength-to-weight ratio Good thermal and electrical conductivity Ductility, malleability Reflects heat and light Waterproofing, barrier effect Reflective properties Recyclability
